Author: mavmaster
Content: I noticed for the run 2 purchase options, there is no longer an undiced die option. Is this still a possibility (my org has dicing and wirebonding capabilities in house).

Author: 246tnt
Content: If you're talking about the "Full wafer" option, It was mentionned somewhere that it was just an omission.

Author: 246tnt
Content: But this is an add-on. You need to actually pay for a slot to be able to use this add-on.

Author: 246tnt
Content: And I'm not sure why you would use that add-on to then dice it ...  The wafer reticle has all project of the run, so there is only 1/40th of wafer that is occupied by your chip so you don't get that many dies for a wafer and you'll get bare dies anyway.   Unless you somehow want to do some more processing steps on the wafer ?
